67471.title: Mary Berry Cooks : For a Crowd
67471.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.
